visual_description: A group of men in dark clothing stand in a dimly lit room with tiled walls and framed artwork; one older man in a light suit gestures with his hands while facing others. The men are positioned in a semi-circle, some looking toward the older man, others at the group or away, with varied postures from standing straight to slightly leaning. The older man’s body is angled toward the group, and his hands move expressively as he speaks, while others remain mostly still, observing.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a moderate pace and pitch, and no noticeable prosody or background noise.
